query: Generate this week's Friday wrap-up digest for my team.
expected_behavior: Fetches merged PRs, awaiting-my-review PRs, blocked-on-others PRs, and hot new issues in parallel.
Groups merged PRs by conventional-commit type; flags security-relevant PRs separately.
Outputs a paste-ready Markdown block with sections Shipped / In flight / Watching / Asks / Next week; never auto-posts.
